channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: UN is waiting to see how much the US intends to pay of the nearly $4 billion it owes
item.description: The United Nations says it’s waiting to find out how much of the nearly $4 billion the United States owes the world organization the Trump administrat...

item.title: Democrats say White House offer on ICE is 'insufficient' as Homeland Security funding set to expire
item.description: Democratic leaders say a proposal from the White House is “incomplete and insufficient” as they are demanding new restrictions on President Donald Tru...

item.title: Investors impatient to recover $140M from alleged Georgia Ponzi scheme
item.description: Seven months after an alleged $140 million Ponzi scheme collapsed, investors are impatient to recover their money

item.title: Record snow drought in Western US raises concern for water shortages and wildfires
item.description: Except for California, most Western states are experiencing the worst snow drought in decades not because of dry conditions but really warm temperatur...

item.title: US immigration court blocks deportation of Tufts graduate student her attorneys say
item.description: An immigration court has blocked the deportation of a Turkish Tufts University student who was detained by immigration officials near her Massachusett...
